description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a combination of flat and sloped roofs, primarily clad in light brown wood and neutral-toned concrete or stucco. The structure is set on a landscaped plot with a stepped pathway leading to the main entrance, surrounded by green lawn areas and retaining walls. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, allowing for ample natural light and views. The roofline is dynamic, with intersecting planes and skylights, adding visual interest and complexity. The property includes a driveway and a partially enclosed outdoor area, possibly a patio or terrace, at the rear. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, blending natural materials with geometric forms.
description: A modern house with intersecting sloped and flat roofs, large asymmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard with a stepped pathway and driveway. The exterior combines wood and concrete for a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, stepped pathway, and landscaped lawn leading up to the house with prominent sloped roof sections.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade, large windows, and the integration of the house with the sloped terrain and retaining walls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the intersecting roof planes, a possible patio or terrace area, and additional skylights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, secondary entrance, and the geometric arrangement of the building's volumes.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and skylights
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a stepped pathway, minimal overhang, and a flush modern door; no porch or columns visible.

license_info.creator_display_name: Miguel dos Santos arquiteto e urbanista
